headline: Freeport-McMoRan (FCX) Earns Another Higher Target As Copper Optimism Builds
summary: With a short percentage of shares outstanding of 1.94%, Freeport-McMoRan Inc. (NYSE:FCX) is among the 9 Best Silver and Copper Stocks to Buy for the EV Transition. On May 21, Daniel Major, analyst of UBS, raised the firm’s price target on Freeport-McMoRan Inc. (NYSE:FCX) to $75 from $74 while maintaining a Buy rating on the shares. On May 15, Deutsche Bank raised its price […]

headline: Can FCX Protect Margins Amid Higher Copper Production Costs in Q2?
summary: FCX faces rising Q2 copper production costs from energy and volume pressures, even as sales volumes show modest sequential recovery.
